The Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe will begin shortly. Racers the
world over have gathered to showcase their talent.

As the race acknowledged the world over as the pinnacle
of turf races, many Umamusume dream of standing on this
track.

Among them is Japan's hope El Condor Pasa, currently
standing behind the gates, eagerly awaiting the
competition.

Thanks to my friends and my own hard work, I'm finally
here...
I'll show everyone... that I'm the world's strongest racer!

El Condor Pasa slowly makes her way into the innermost
gate.

Will she triumph where all other Japanese racers have
failed and grant her fans' long-awaited dreams?
The Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe... begins now!

Japan's El Condor Pasa is off to a magnificent start. She
boldly takes the lead right away.

The rest of the pack is a free-for-all, with favorite Montjeu
currently positioned on the inside.
The course is in worse shape than I thought.
But I'm in tip-top form! Now to keep up this pace!

Adopting the pace chasing strategy, El Condor Pasa
widens her lead by three, now four lengths!

The racers enter the third corner, where a long, grueling
incline awaits.

Still in the lead is El Condor Pasa. Japan's racer is pulling
away from her fearsome opponents as she rounds the
corner!

I'm not even short of breath... And my legs are moving just
fine...

I've got this. As long as nothing unexpected happens... I'll
win!

El Condor Pasa, the hope of all of Japan, is heading into
the final straightaway!
I see it! I see the finish line of my dreams!
And beyond it, the glory of the world's strongest!
Hrrrraaaaugh!
El Condor Pasa! El Condor Pasa begins her spurt!

She's leaving behind the rest of the pack! What strength,
El Condor Pasa! The Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe is hers for
the taking!
So this what Japan's racers are made of...

What's this?! Montjeu is approaching at fantastic speed!
She's begun her own final spurt!
Just a hundred more meters! El Condor Pasa is so close!

But Montjeu's caught up! Montjeu's caught up! MONTJEU
HAS CAUGHT UP!

You are indeed strong... Heh, what a wonderful world we
live in.
However!

El Condor Pasa fights on! Japan's hopes and dreams are so
close!
But it's no use! Montjeu has taken the lead!
I can't lose here! I can't lose here! I CAN'T LOSE HEEERE!

My dreams are finally within my grasp! Everything I've
worked for is right in front of me!
AAAAAAUUUGH!
El Condor Pasa desperately tries to regain her lead!

But Montjeu maintains her lead and... crosses the finish line
in first place!
Japan's El Condor Pasa was so close... So close! But she was passed at the last minute!

We've witnessed the barrier to the world in action! El
Condor Pasa's journey ends in a heart-wrenching second
place!
